nasb.text: and so as to teach the sons of Israel all the statutes which the Lord has spoken to them through Moses.”

esv.text: and you are to teach the people of Israel all the statutes that the Lord has spoken to them by Moses.”

cnv.text: 可以把耶和華藉著摩西告訴以色列人的一切律例，教訓他們。”

ccb.text: 你们必须将我借摩西赐给以色列人的一切律例教导他们。”
